scripts.build: node scripts/apply-google-tag.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['index.html','leistungen/index.html','ueber-uns/index.html','einblicke/index.html','bewertungen/index.html','kontakt/index.html','impressum/index.html','datenschutz/index.html','kundenkarte/index.html','api/lead.js','.env.example','sitemap.xml','robots.txt'].forEach(f=>fs.accessSync(f)); console.log('Static site build check passed')"
